description: n-gram point cloud → Betti numbers β₀/β₁. Detects structural anomalies invisible to regex. Runs in <2ms.
Depth-3 recursive decode: base64, hex, ROT13, Caesar, word-split, UUencode, Unicode homoglyphs.
15 regex patterns (AWS, JWT, Stripe, GitHub, SSH) + Shannon entropy scan. Zero plaintext in memory.
Rule-based semantic analyser. Compound risk escalation: 3+ MEDIUM signals → HIGH verdict.
MiniLM embeddings → Poincaré ball. 70% cosine + 30% hyperbolic distance blend. Adversarial suffix stripping.
Bayesian DAG over 5 evidence nodes. Pearl do-calculus backdoor correction. Gray-zone requests get causal reasoning.
URL phishing detection + social engineering pattern matching. Covers pretexting, authority spoofing, urgency.
Redis sliding window rate scorer. Shadow ban at score ≥ 0.75. Three strategies: gaslight, delay, standard.
CPT drift gate rejects calibration updates shifting any parameter >25% from prior. Prevents coordinated poisoning.
PII masking with Fernet-encrypted vault, HMAC-SHA256 reverse map. No plaintext stored in memory or logs.
Progressive streaming with 400-char fast-scan buffer → live-emit. Drop-in replacement for OpenAI clients.
Claude Opus 4.6 agentic loop. 30 tools. 7 ARQ cron schedules. Redis memory: 20-turn cap, 6h TTL.
4 specialised sub-agents (SOVAOperator, ThreatHunter, ForensicsAgent, ComplianceAgent). HMAC task tokens. Human-in-the-loop approval.
Autonomous anomaly detection. OLS trend prediction. SQLite recipe cache. Haiku incident classification.
Session-level threat pattern detection including INJECTION_CHAIN. Cryptographic attestation chain.
Playwright headless Chromium. ScreencastRecorder captures video → MinIO SOC 2 evidence bundles.
In-process Claude Vision page assertion. No HTTP round-trip. Requires Playwright + Anthropic API key.
Claude Vision baseline vs candidate screenshot comparison. Verdicts: IDENTICAL / MINOR_DIFF / REGRESSION / CRITICAL.
SOVA tool #29: calls ShadowAIDetector directly. 18 providers. Falls back gracefully without package.
SOVA tool #30: causal chain retrieval from logs + XAI rationale. Used by ScenarioRunner smart_retry.
Snowflake→base-62 entity IDs (SEP-{11 chars}). Cryptographically-unique, sortable, collision-free.
Three sharing modes: MIRROR_ONLY, REWRAP_ALLOWED, FULL_SYNC. HMAC-SHA256 handshake. Duplicate guard.
72-hour Redis-backed one-time invitation tokens. Invitee identity verified before member enrollment.
5-badge system: NEWCOMER → TRUSTED → CONTRIBUTOR → EXPERT → ELITE. Anonymised leaderboard (GDPR-safe).
Versioned community charters (DRAFT→ACTIVE→SUPERSEDED). Member acceptance tracking. Compliance scoring.
Z-score anomaly scoring. NORMAL/ELEVATED/CRITICAL thresholds. 30-day rolling baseline. SQLite event store.
14-provider OAuth catalog. Scope-based risk scoring. ALLOW/MONITOR/BLOCK verdicts. Redis-backed policy.
Weighted risk score: 40% transfer rejection + 35% anomaly + 25% governance gap. SAFE→CRITICAL labels.
SHA-256 prev_hash chain per community. Genesis block. OASIS STIX JSONL export for SIEM ingestion.
Auto-scan notes on save. Share via SEP UECIID. XAI pipeline visualization. Offline publish queue. Sidebar view.
Slash command handler with HMAC-SHA256 verification. HIGH/BLOCK + share alerts via webhook.
Duck-typed WardenCallback for seamless LangChain pipeline integration. Zero config change required.
Splunk HEC + Elastic ECS format. Custom field mappings. SOC 2 Type II evidence ingestion.
Test matrix (3.11/3.12) + lint + Docker smoke + mutation testing. Coverage gate ≥75%.
Hybrid Ed25519 + ML-DSA-65 (FIPS 204). HybridKEM: X25519 + ML-KEM-768 (FIPS 203). liboqs fail-open.
8 jurisdictions: EU/US/UK/CA/SG/AU/JP/CH. MASQUE tunnels (H3/H2/TCP). TOFU TLS pinning. Least-latency routing.
Per-jurisdiction MinIO routing. Fernet-encrypted pod keys. 5s health probes. Jurisdiction→data_class resolution.
HMAC-SHA256 signed. 7-year Redis TTL. 10K cap per tenant. O(1) historical routing verification.
CLASSIFIED → never. PHI → 5 jurisdictions. GENERAL → all with adequacy. EU↔UK/CA/JP/CH decisions built-in.
Upgrade path to ML-KEM-1024 for post-quantum key exchange at FIPS 203 Security Level 5. Higher lattice dimension than ML-KEM-768 — stronger quantum resistance for long-lived keys.

feature: HSM integration — PKCS#11 bridge for sovereign key material
description: PKCS#11 bridge to Hardware Security Modules for protecting sovereign key material. Keys never leave tamper-resistant hardware — enforced at the driver level.

feature: Certificate-pinned MASQUE tunnels — TOFU → CA-signed upgrade path
description: Upgrade path from Trust-On-First-Use certificate pinning to CA-signed certificates for MASQUE tunnels. Enables enterprise-managed PKI with zero connectivity interruption during migration.
Claude Opus auto-generates rules from HIGH/BLOCK events. ArXiv synthesis → attack examples hot-reloaded.
ArXiv paper hunter + OSV CVE scanner. Auto-feeds Evolution Engine. Runs every 6h background.
OSV API dependency CVE scanner + ArXiv LLM-attack paper hunter. Saves to data/intel_report.json.
Pre-processing step in HyperbolicBrain. Strips common adversarial suffixes before embedding projection.
ARQ cron every 30min. Delegates to WardenHealer — no LLM on happy path. Alerts on corpus DEGRADED.
9 pipeline stage spans with timing, verdict, score. gRPC export to Jaeger. GDPR-safe: no raw content on spans.
Full metric singletons: SHADOW_BAN_TOTAL, SHADOW_BAN_COST_SAVED_USD, P99 latency, bypass rate, corpus drift.
Pre-built SLO dashboards. Alerts: P99 latency, 5xx rate, availability, shadow ban rate, corpus drift.
Full pipeline trace visualization. 9 spans per request. Span attributes: stage, verdict, score (GDPR-safe).
Structured log shipping via Promtail. Integrated with Grafana for log-metric correlation.
Per-request deep dive: verdict, risk score, stage timing, causal chain. Full audit trail with request ID.
HTTP/SSL/DNS/TCP checks. TimescaleDB hypertable + continuous aggregates. 90-day retention. PagerDuty webhooks.
IBM 2024 breach cost benchmarks × industry multiplier × blocked events. ASCII ROI report + PDF export.

feature: Real-time anomaly WebSocket stream — push XAI events to dashboard without polling
description: WebSocket-based push of XAI anomaly events and incident alerts directly to the SOC dashboard and other observability surfaces. Eliminates polling — latency drops to near-zero. Backed by FastAPI WebSocket endpoint + Redis Pub/Sub fan-out. Client auto-reconnects on disconnect.

feature: Kubernetes horizontal pod autoscaler for warden + dashboard services
description: HPA manifests for the warden (FastAPI) and dashboard (Next.js) Deployments. Scales on CPU ≥ 70% and memory ≥ 80%. Min 2 replicas / max 10 per service. Paired with PodDisruptionBudgets (minAvailable: 1) for zero-downtime rolling updates. Metrics served via metrics-server; custom metrics via Prometheus Adapter for P99 latency scaling.

Active-active deployment across EU (Frankfurt) and US (Virginia) regions. Tenant-aware GeoDNS routing, cross-region Postgres streaming replication, Redis active-active via CRDTs, MinIO bucket replication. Automatic failover with < 30s RTO. Sovereign data residency rules enforced at the routing layer.

feature: Mobile SOC app — React Native, push alerts for HIGH/BLOCK verdicts
description: React Native mobile application (iOS + Android) with real-time push notifications for HIGH and BLOCK security verdicts. SOC operators receive instant alerts on-the-go with verdict details, risk score, causal stage, and a one-tap link to the full XAI report. Powered by FCM/APNs via the SOVA alerting pipeline.

feature: Grafana unified dashboard for all 11 services
description: Single Grafana dashboard consolidating metrics from all 11 Docker Compose services: proxy, warden, app, analytics, dashboard, postgres, redis, prometheus, grafana, minio, minio-init. Panels cover CPU/memory per container, request rates, error budgets, and storage utilisation.
Real-time event log. Threat Radar tab. Causal Arbiter interactive visualizer. Secrets Governance 6-tab UI.
App Router + TanStack Query + Recharts. Events, threats, sandbox, metrics, traces. Dark theme. Port 3002.
Next.js 14 app. 6-section collapsible sidebar. API keys, settings, billing, communities, security views.
9-stage causal chain visualization. Stage hit rates, top causes, flag distribution. HTML + PDF download.

DNS A record pointing dash.shadow-warden-ai.com → 91.98.234.160. Served by Caddy v2 over HTTPS with HSTS, HTTP/3 (QUIC), and wildcard TLS cert. Zero-config access to the Next.js 14 SOC Dashboard without exposing port 3002.

feature: Analytics API live endpoints in SOC dashboard (replace mock/placeholder data)
description: Replace placeholder/mock data in the SOC dashboard with live Analytics API endpoints. Dashboard will display live counters, charts, event streams, and cost-savings figures pulled directly from the production warden backend. Affects overview, threats, ROI, and metrics pages.

Adaptive layout and touch-friendly controls for the SOC dashboard, ensuring full functionality on smartphones and tablets. Collapsible sidebar, stacked metric cards, swipeable event log, and viewport-aware chart sizing.

feature: Onboarding flow — guided 5-step setup wizard for new tenants
description: A 5-step guided setup wizard in the Tenant Portal (app.shadow-warden-ai.com). Steps: (1) Generate API key, (2) Choose tier, (3) Configure integrations, (4) Run first security scan, (5) Review dashboard. New tenants go from zero to live protection in under 5 minutes.

feature: Dark/light theme toggle in portal and SOC dashboard
description: User-controlled theme switcher in the Tenant Portal and SOC dashboard. Preference persisted in localStorage. System theme detected on first load via prefers-color-scheme media query. Supports both dark and light modes for accessibility and user comfort.

feature: shadow-warden-ai.com/pricing — interactive tier comparison + add-on calculator
description: Full interactive pricing page with tier comparison table, monthly/annual toggle (15% discount), add-on grid, and a real-time cost calculator. Data-driven from roadmap.json.
Art. 17 right-to-erasure. Export/purge endpoints. Metadata-only logging — content never stored.
Full Data Protection Impact Assessment. Necessity, proportionality, risk mitigation analysis documented.
Control mapping + auditor collection procedures. Pre-built evidence bundles from MinIO. ScreencastRecorder.
5 vault connectors (AWS SM, Azure KV, HashiCorp, GCP SM, Env). SQLite inventory. Expiry alerts, rotation.
Per-tenant API keys. SHA-256 constant-time compare. Startup raises RuntimeError if key unset.
Map platform controls to ISO 27001 Annex A, providing clear evidence of compliance with international information security standards.
11 services with healthchecks + resource limits. proxy, warden, app, analytics, dashboard, postgres, redis, prometheus, grafana, minio, minio-init.
QUIC/HTTP3 (UDP 443). Hostname-based routing. HSTS + Alt-Svc. Automatic HTTPS. caddy-data volume.
S3-compatible. warden-evidence/ session bundles. warden-logs/ date-partitioned. Background ship, fail-open.
1,000 requests/month. Basic 9-layer pipeline. 1 tenant. Community support.
5,000 requests/month. Full pipeline. PII & secret redaction. Streamlit dashboard. XAI Reports add-on available.
10,000 req/mo. Obsidian integration. Secrets Governance. 3 communities × 10 members. 180-day retention.
50,000 req/mo. MasterAgent SOC. Evolution Engine. Evidence Vault + STIX 2.1. SOC 2 + GDPR audit package.
Unlimited requests. PQC (FIPS 203/204). Sovereign AI Cloud across 8 jurisdictions. SAML/OIDC SSO.
Async /24 subnet probe. 18 provider fingerprints. MONITOR/BLOCK/ALLOWLIST policy. DNS telemetry.
9-stage causal chain. Primary cause attribution. PDF reports for SOC 2 evidence packages.
Multi-cloud vault connectors. SQLite inventory, lifecycle alerts, policy compliance score.
MinIO on-prem, self-hosted Prometheus/Grafana, air-gapped Evolution Engine mode.
Stackable +5 extra seats per unit. Combine with any higher tier for unlimited seat expansion.
XAI Audit Reports + Secrets Vault + Shadow AI Discovery. Saves $7 vs. individual pricing.
Secure checkout via Lemon Squeezy (PCI-DSS Level 1). Supports credit/debit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers. Webhook handler for subscription lifecycle events.
14-day full-feature trial on Individual, Community Business, and Pro tiers. No credit card required. Automatically converts to paid plan at trial end with prior consent.
Annual subscription option on all paid tiers. 15% discount versus monthly billing. Billed as a single upfront payment. Displayed as effective monthly rate in the pricing UI.
Self-service billing portal powered by Lemon Squeezy. Customers can manage payment methods, view invoices, upgrade/downgrade plans, and cancel subscriptions without contacting support.
Automated Slack webhook and email notifications for subscription events: renewal upcoming, payment failed, plan upgraded/downgraded, trial expiring in 3 days.
FastAPI endpoint at /billing/webhook. Processes subscription_created, subscription_updated, subscription_cancelled, order_created events. HMAC-SHA256 signature verification.

feature: Usage dashboard — request counter + cost savings in SOC
description: Live request counter, monthly usage bar, cost savings tally, and overage projection in the SOC dashboard Overview page. Powered by Prometheus metrics + Analytics API.

feature: Request overage billing — automatic charge per 1k requests above Pro tier
description: Automatic charge per 1k requests above Pro tier limit. Estimated $0.05 per 1k requests. Charged automatically at end of billing period via Lemon Squeezy. No service interruption — usage continues unthrottled. Detailed overage report available in the SOC dashboard.

feature: Add-on: Obsidian Business Pack — bundled plugin features +$8/mo
description: Bundled Obsidian plugin features: advanced scheduling, offline queue, XAI viz, Dataview dashboard, sidebar.
Lemon Squeezy currency localisation for EU, UK, Canadian, and Australian customers. Prices displayed and charged in local currency. Exchange rates updated daily.
Change the display name of your Shadow Warden project. Propagated to all tenant-scoped API responses.
Tune thresholds, timeouts, and resilience strategy without container restarts. Changes take effect in <100ms.
Per-tenant API key provisioning with SHA-256 constant-time compare and fail-closed auth at startup.
System-synced or manual dark/light toggle. Preference persisted in localStorage.
WCAG 2.1 AA · EAA 2019/882 compliant floating widget. High contrast, reduce motion, dyslexia font, focus ring.
TOTP-based 2FA for all operator accounts. Required for Pro+ tenants in SOC 2 audit mode.
Fernet key format validated at startup. Startup halts with a clear error if invalid, preventing silent misconfigs.
SOVA-automated key rotation at 02:00 UTC daily. Community keypair rotation, HMAC re-keying.
Connect your Obsidian vault for auto-scan, PII detection, and SEP sharing via the plugin.
Real-time HIGH/BLOCK alerts to your Slack channel. Includes SOVA morning briefs and SLA reports.
Automated CI pipeline with test matrix (3.11/3.12), lint, Docker smoke, and mutation testing.
Splunk HEC and Elastic ECS integration for streaming security events to your existing SIEM.
Export all tenant data on request. Metadata-only logging enforced — raw content never stored.
Automated retention scheduler. ARQ cron purges logs older than configured retention window.
Per-tenant visibility flags. GDPR Art. 17 right-to-erasure endpoint at DELETE /gdpr/purge.
Unified fake activation via mock.patch. X-Simulation-ID isolation. FakeAnthropicClient, FakeS3Storage.
ScenarioRunner + ScenarioStep with smart_retry. YAML loader. XAI causal-chain hint on failure.
mutmut on secret_redactor.py + semantic_guard.py. Threshold: 20 surviving mutants. Linux/WSL/CI only.
Realistic traffic simulation. 1000+ RPS sustained. Latency SLO validation. CI-integrated.
pytest --cov-fail-under=75. Matrix: Python 3.11 + 3.12. Adversarial tests informational (||true).
